{{Quote|For your information, ''Professor'' Na'al asked me to assist him with some research.|Pollo Tipn, to Herg|<ref name="Field Work">{{WEGCite|story=Field Work|book=The Thrawn Trilogy Sourcebook}}</ref>}}
'''Pollo Tipn''' was a [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] history student and pupil of [[Voren Na'al/Legends|Voren Na'al]]. Nearly ten years after the [[Assault on Mount Tantiss|destruction]] of [[Mount Tantiss/Legends|Mount Tantiss]], Na'al enlisted Tipn to join him in a confidential fact-finding mission to the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]], investigating for [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] some unusual reports connected to [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]]. As preliminary research, Na'al tasked Tipn with reviewing his original notes regarding the [[Thrawn campaign]] before boarding a shuttle for [[Exocron]].<ref name="Field Work" /> Tipn prepared a preliminary report based on Na'al's material for his professor's review, which also included information from the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] archives.<ref name="TTTS">''[[The Thrawn Trilogy Sourcebook]]''</ref>

Among Tipn's acquaintances at the university was the boisterous [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] native, [[Herg]].<ref name="Field Work" />

==Personality and traits==
Tipn, despite the impatience that came naturally to his species, was regarded by Professor Na'al as an excellent researcher, with keen eyes and mind.<ref name="Field Work" />
